metadata.description: Short project prefix used in resource names.
Azure region. Defaults to Sweden Central but is configurable for other regions.
Tags applied to all resources.
Source database type to provision for the benchmark. PostgreSQL is the validated default.
Benchmark VM admin username.
SSH public key for benchmark VM access.
Operator public IP CIDR allowed to SSH to the benchmark VM, e.g. 203.0.113.10/32.
PostgreSQL administrator username.
PostgreSQL administrator password.
PostgreSQL benchmark database name.
PostgreSQL major version. Fabric mirroring requires PostgreSQL 14 or later.
PostgreSQL non-burstable SKU name.
PostgreSQL tier. Burstable is intentionally not allowed for Fabric mirroring.
PostgreSQL storage size in GiB.
Enable Microsoft Entra authentication for PostgreSQL while keeping PostgreSQL password authentication enabled.
Optional Microsoft Entra administrator display/login name for PostgreSQL. Leave empty to enable Entra auth without assigning an admin in ARM.
Optional Microsoft Entra administrator object ID for PostgreSQL. Required with postgresEntraAdminName to create the admin assignment.
Microsoft Entra principal type for the optional PostgreSQL Entra administrator.
MySQL administrator username. Used when sourceType=mysql.
MySQL administrator password. Used when sourceType=mysql.
MySQL benchmark database name. Used when sourceType=mysql.
MySQL Flexible Server version. Used when sourceType=mysql.
MySQL non-burstable SKU name. Used when sourceType=mysql.
MySQL storage size in GiB. Used when sourceType=mysql.
Entra administrator login name for Azure SQL sources. Required when sourceType=azure-sql-db or sql-mi.
Entra administrator object ID for Azure SQL sources. Required when sourceType=azure-sql-db or sql-mi.
Azure SQL Database name. Used when sourceType=azure-sql-db.
SQL Server VM administrator username. Used when sourceType=sql-server.
SQL Server VM administrator password. Used when sourceType=sql-server.
Fabric capacity SKU for the benchmark.
UPN of the Fabric capacity administrator.
